text: The guard moves to apprehend you, you try to think of ways to get out of this sticky situation but you realize you can’t. With your confidence in your intelligence destroyed you decide to stop running and turn yourself in, guard lands a blow upon your noggin. You black out.………When you next awake it’s in the village jail, apparently attempted theft is crime in this strange village. As you pass the time on your 30 year sentence you can’t help but think about what you could’ve done differently. Congratulations You Have Found The Convict Ending [New Game]
